title: TSAN data race on filterPartsByPrimaryKeyAndSkipIndexes
description:
### Describe the bug
Seen here: https://s3.amazonaws.com/clickhouse-test-reports/json.html?REF=master&sha=03d53e08d485b12850bf39987beea3586c16f80b&name_0=MasterCI&name_1=AST+fuzzer+%28amd_tsan%29
### How to reproduce
Simplified to:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Int, PROJECTION p (SELECT _part_offset ORDER BY c0)) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple();
INSERT INTO t0 SELECT number FROM numbers(5);
INSERT INTO t0 SELECT number FROM numbers(5);
SELECT 1 FROM t0 PREWHERE _part_offset = 1 SETTINGS max_rows_to_read = 1;
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
==================
WARNING: ThreadSanitizer: data race (pid=549993)
Write of size 1 at 0x7fff13defa39 by thread T720:

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT, value FLOAT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ENGINE = OBServer() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE t2 (user_id INT, score INT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES t1(id)) ENGINE = OBServer() ORDER BY user_id;
SELECT t1.id, t1.value, t2.score FROM t1 LEFT JOIN t2 ON t1.id = t2.user_id WHERE t1.value > 15.0 ORDER BY t1.id;
